atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety was good now.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety was brutal in November and December.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he had no idea why anxiety was brutal in November and December.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety was good now, thankfully, after being on buspar.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports singulair was also started.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient worries about anxiety caused by singulair.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient mentions he was fine now.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he stopped taking camila birth control.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports increased hunger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure was within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's heart rate was within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation revealed some bumps in the breasts.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The breast felt slightly denser to the touch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety has improved.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hormonal factors may be contributing to his symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is concerned about potential breast abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of abnormal pap in 2009.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician recommends monitoring the breast lumps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician recommends considering a referral to a breast specialist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician orders a referral to a breast specialist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician plans a follow-up appointment to assess the breast lumps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician plans to discuss potential interventions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician instructs the patient to continue taking the prescribed medication.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician instructs the patient to monitor for any changes in symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician instructs the patient to contact the clinic if symptoms worsen or do not improve.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician orders a repeat pap smear in six months.
